description:
Find all references to a C# symbol across the workspace using Roslyn semantic analysis (same engine as Visual Studio). Unlike grep, results are semantically exact: overloads, partial classes, generics and using-aliases are resolved; comment/string mentions are excluded.

Code references only — Unity serialized references in scenes/prefabs/assets are not visible here; use unity_code_usages for those.

file_path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path to the .cs file containing the symbol.

line.description: Optional 1-based line hint where the symbol appears (use the line numbers shown by read). Forgiving: if the symbol is not on this line, the nearest whole-word occurrence in the file is used and the output notes the adjustment. Omit it (or pass 0) when the symbol appears on only one line of the file; with several occurrences and no hint, the candidate lines are listed instead.

include_declaration.description: Include the declaration itself in results. Default false.
